description_long: This bungalow features a sprawling single-story layout with a prominent, wide hip roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The exterior walls are finished in a muted light blue-gray, complemented by white-framed windows distributed across the facades. A covered porch area is visible at the front, supported by columns, providing a shaded entryway. The property includes a landscaped yard with a large tree, paved patio area, and a pergola structure with outdoor seating. The rear of the bungalow opens to a paved driveway and additional outdoor living spaces, including a small pool or water feature. The overall design is open and inviting, with a focus on outdoor living and relaxation.
description: A single-story bungalow with a wide hip roof, light blue-gray walls, a covered porch, and landscaped outdoor areas including a pergola and patio. The design emphasizes open, comfortable living with ample outdoor space.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, and landscaped yard with a driveway and patio area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the pergola, outdoor seating, pool or water feature, and large tree adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the long expanse of the hip roof, minimal windows, and the pergola structure in the background.
description_view_3: Alternate front/side view showing the porch, grouped windows, and the transition between the house and outdoor living spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
